title: NotHunt - No Compass Manhunt!
description: Minecraft Manhunt, Tracker over all dimensions (even The End), Alerts, Multiple runners, Numerous Objectives, Tweaks, WHAT ELSE DO YOU WANT?
body:
# NotHunt Datapack

A comprehensive Minecraft manhunt datapack with extensive customization options, multiple game modes, and advanced tracking features.

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the datapack
2. Navigate to your Minecraft world's datapacks folder:
   - `.minecraft/saves/[Your World Name]/datapacks/`
3. Place the `NotHunt` folder into the datapacks directory
4. Load or reload your world

### Loading the Datapack

If the world is already running, reload the datapack using:
```
/reload
```

You'll see a yellow message in chat: "NotHunt Loaded. Click to open settings menu and start another game!"

---

## ⚙️ Configuration & Settings

### Opening the Settings Menu

Only operators (OPs) can configure the datapack. To open the settings menu:
```
/function nothunt:settings
```

This will display an interactive menu in chat where you can configure all game settings by clicking on options.

---

## 🎮 Game Settings Overview

### **Runners Objective**
Choose what the runners must accomplish to win:

- **Kill the Ender Dragon** *(Default)* - Classic manhunt where runners must defeat the Ender Dragon
- **Get a Diamond** - Runners win when one player obtains a diamond
- **Go to the Nether** - Runners win when one player enters the Nether
- **Survivor** - Runners must survive for a set amount of time

### **Game Timer**
Set a time limit for completing objectives (except Survivor mode):
- **Disabled** - No time limit
- **5, 10, 20, 30, 45, 60, 90, 120, or 180 minutes**

If runners don't complete their objective within the time limit, hunters win.

*Note: In Survivor mode, this setting determines how long runners must survive.*

### **Choose Runners Randomly**
Automatically select runners at the start of the game:
- **Disabled** - Manually choose runners
- **1-20 runners** - Randomly select this many players to be runners

### **Glow Hunters When They're Close**
- **Enabled**: Hunters glow (visible through walls) when within 15 blocks of a runner
- **Disabled**: No glowing effect

### **Alert Runners When Hunters Are Close**
- **Enabled**: Runners receive a chat alert when hunters are within 20 blocks
- **Disabled**: No alerts

### **Hunters Boost**
Give hunters a permanent effect throughout the game:
- None
- Fast Swimming (Dolphin's Grace)
- Fire Resistance
- Haste (faster mining)
- Invisibility
- Jump Boost
- Night Vision
- Water Breathing
- Double Hearts (40 hearts instead of 20)
- Speed Boost

### **Runners Boost**
Give runners a permanent effect throughout the game (same options as Hunters Boost)

### **Hunters Countdown**
Freeze hunters at the start to give runners a head start:
- **Disabled** - Hunters can move immediately
- **15 seconds, 30 seconds, 1 minute, 5 minutes, or 10 minutes**

### **Runners Lives**
Number of times each runner can die before being eliminated:
- **1-5 lives**

---

## 👥 Managing Players

### Adding Players to the Match

#### **Automatic Selection**
If "Choose Runners Randomly" is enabled in settings, runners will be selected automatically when the match starts.

#### **Manual Selection**

1. After configuring settings, click **[Done]** in the settings menu
2. The game will enter preparation mode
3. Players can join as runners using the trigger command:
   ```
   /trigger JoinRunners
   ```

4. **Operators** can manually add players as runners:
   ```
   /execute as <PlayerName> run trigger JoinRunners
   ```
   Example:
   ```
   /execute as Steve run trigger JoinRunners
   ```

5. Once all runners are selected, start the match:
   ```
   /function nothunt:preparation/start
   ```

### Team Assignment

- **Runners** - Players who must complete the objective
- **Hunters** - All other players who joined the match (not selected as runners)
- **Spectators** - Players who join after the match starts or were not added to the match

### Removing Players

To remove a runner during preparation phase, they can use:
```
/execute as PlayerName run function nothunt:preparation/leaverunners
```
This toggles their runner status.

---

## 🧭 In-Game Compasses (Hunter Tracking)

Hunters have access to a powerful tracking system to locate runners.

### **How to Use Tracking**

Hunters can track specific runners using the compass system:

1. **Open tracking menu**:
   ```
   /trigger Track
   ```

2. **Select a runner** - Click on a runner's name in chat to track them

3. **Switch targets** - Use `/trigger Track` again to change which runner you're tracking

### **Toggle HUD**

Runners can toggle their HUD on/off:
```
/trigger Hud
```

---

## 🏁 Ending a Match

### **Manual End**

Operators can manually end the match at any time:
```
/function nothunt:endmatch
```

### **Automatic Win Conditions**

The match ends automatically when:

**Runners Win:**
- All runners complete the objective (Kill Dragon/Get Diamond/Enter Nether)
- Runners survive the timer in Survivor mode
- In timed modes, if at least one runner is alive when time runs out (unless objective-specific)

**Hunters Win:**
- All runners are eliminated (die more times than their life count)
- Time runs out before runners complete their objective (in timed modes)

---

## 🔧 Troubleshooting

### The datapack isn't working
1. Make sure you have operator permissions
2. Run `/reload` to reload the datapack
3. Check that the datapack is in the correct folder

### Players can't join as runners
1. Ensure the match hasn't started yet
2. Make sure players have the trigger permission enabled
3. Try using the manual command: `/execute as <Player> run trigger JoinRunners`

### Compass not working
1. Make sure you're a hunter (not a runner or spectator)
2. Use `/trigger Track` to initialize tracking
3. Ensure there are runners in the match

### Game won't start
1. Ensure at least one runner is selected
2. Run `/function nothunt:preparation/start` after selecting runners
3. Check that you completed the settings configuration

---

## 📝 Commands Reference

| Command | Who Can Use | Description |
|---------|------------|-------------|
| `/function nothunt:settings` | OPs only | Open settings menu |
| `/reload` | OPs only | Reload the datapack |
| `/trigger JoinRunners` | All players | Join runners team (preparation phase) |
| `/trigger Track` | Hunters | Open runner tracking menu |
| `/trigger Hud` | Runners | Toggle HUD display |
| `/function nothunt:preparation/start` | OPs only | Start the match |
| `/function nothunt:endmatch` | OPs only | End the current match |
